question_label: Do you know what Hemoglobin A1C testing is?
Which of the following statements best describes when you learned that the Red Cross was offering Hemoglobin A1C testing as part of the blood donation process in March?
Prior to your recent donation were you aware of your A1C level?
Knowing about complimentary A1C testing was a factor in my decision to give blood or platelets.
Hemoglobin A1C testing would motivate me to schedule a donation appointment in the future.
Receiving complementary health screenings (e.g., A1C, blood pressure, etc.) will influence me to donate blood in the future.
Learning my A1C level through a blood donation is of interest to me.
I scheduled an appointment to give so that I could receive a complimentary A1C test.
